Mechanism: broadened grounding, kind-differentiated SFT, matched evaluation

Outcome absorbed; superseded as a forward path by the SGM redirection (node 53). Three coupled changes answering the M1 findings: worldgen broadens to eight domain lexicons with multihop, notstated, and transitive question kinds; instruction pairs carry their task kind so the co-trained stream can reserve kinds for finetuning; and the evaluation is realigned to score exactly what the grounded corpus trains, by exact match per kind.

Worldgen samples each world from one of eight domain vocabularies (office, clinic, school, cafe, depot, studio, transit, sports; modern everyday registers, since referent-freeness is deferred), states ages relatively or in absolute years, and asks fragment questions in four categories: retrieval, comparison, multihop (compose an object's owner with that owner's stated residence or workplace), and notstated (the asked fact is verifiably absent and the gold answer is a decline). Order puzzles add transitive pairwise questions whose names are never adjacent in the chain. Pairs are tagged by kind; pretrain.instruction_kinds restricts co-training to basic kinds so multihop and notstated are finetune-only. Evaluation leads with grounded instructions and stratified binding, exact-matched per kind, with a notstated fabrication gauge; real-world sets are demoted to a labeled out-of-distribution section.

Priorities set by the user after the M1 reading: generation is updated first and evaluation second because the two must match, and referent-freeness stays a long-deferred secondary objective, behind even the graph milestone; the strong generator LLM exists to inject higher-level logic than the writer could produce alone (node 37), not to compensate for synthetic-data diversity, so diversity is restored programmatically through domain lexicons rather than by re-admitting real referents. The notstated kind teaches the epistemic boundary whose absence node 51 diagnosed: a model trained only on answerable pairs fabricates in perfect form, so a share of pairs whose correct response is a decline gives the boundary a learnable surface, and the same kind scored in evaluation turns fabrication into a number. Kind-differentiated SFT gives finetuning a distinct job for the first time since co-training was adopted (node 30): with multihop and notstated reserved, the pretrain-to-sft delta on those sub-scores is a direct measurement of whether finetuning can add a capability rather than re-teach a distribution. Every new question kind is verified by independent recomputation over 500 samples (construction-solving asymmetry, node 37). Reads on generation (node 11), the world-state mechanism (node 36), grounded generation (node 46), the binding probe (node 33), and the evaluate stage (node 16); the rerun of the ladder on this broadened corpus is the revised M2 (node 49). Outcome and two corrections from the second ladder (world-52c749db): the kind-differentiation delivered the first meaningful pretrain-to-sft capability delta (grounded 0.28 to 0.60, binding 0.38 to 0.73 at the full rung, with reserved multihop at 1.0 and notstated at 0.75 after sft), validating the mechanism. First, the exact-match scorer read only the head of the answer while half the pairs train a derivation style whose conclusion arrives last, so correct worked answers scored wrong; scoring now also accepts the gold leading the final sentence. Second, the first broadening produced eight flavors of the same invented pre-industrial world, cosmetic rather than real diversity; the lexicons were replaced with modern everyday registers (office, clinic, school, cafe, depot, studio, transit, sports) with color-qualified objects and ordinary first names mixed among invented ones, per the standing priority that referent-freeness is deferred and the surface should read like the everyday world the generator LLM writes best. Superseded as a forward path (node 53): the scorer fix and the everyday-register lesson carry forward, and kind-differentiated SFT survives as the reserved-kinds mechanism inside the tier schedule (node 56), but the broadened grounded corpus itself is retired to a baseline.
